description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard with lush greenery and landscaping. The structure features a large, light-colored hip roof and a driveway leading to a garage or carport at the front. The backyard includes a freeform swimming pool, several lounge chairs, and a small gazebo or pavilion, creating a recreational outdoor space. The house has multiple windows, with a prominent set of large windows at the front and additional windows along the sides. The property is enclosed by a tall fence lined with dense shrubbery, providing privacy. The overall design is modern and spacious, with a focus on outdoor living and relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, fenced yard, pool, gazebo, and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and large front windows with dense greenery along the fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a gazebo, as well as the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side-rear view displaying the pool, gazebo, and side windows, with the fence and landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the long side of the bungalow, the pool area, and the continuous fence with greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
